stemHtml: How is the indication of Mach number obtained? From…

options.a: Indicated speed and altitude using a speed indicator equipped with an altimeter type aneroid.
options.b: Indicated speed (IAS) compared with true air speed (TAS) from the air data computer.
options.c: An ordinary airspeed indicator scaled for Mach numbers instead of knots.
options.d: A kind of echo sound comparing velocity of sound with indicated speed.
